description: Mock code-mixed Malayalam/Manglish chat messages for the sentiment demo — a week of messages from Maya's college group chat.

messages.text: Machane launch kandu! Adipoli aayittundu, valare nannayi
Kidilan launch! Ellavarum parayunnu super aanu ennu
Thanks da, othiri santhosham. Team full effort aayirunnu
Innu evide? Beach il pokam, nalla weather aanu
Varam! Kure naal aayi break eduthittu, ippo sugham thonnunnu
ഇന്നത്തെ ദിവസം അടിപൊളി ആയിരുന്നു, ഒത്തിരി സന്തോഷം
Server down aayi, full pani. Deshyam varunnu
Onnum sheriyavunnilla, ellam waste aayi thonnunnu. Ksheenam
Kurachu bhedam undu, pakshe full sheriyayittilla. Boradi aanu
Fix aayi! Ella users um thirichu vannu, valare santhosham
Pwoli! Ithu vere level aanu machane, congrats
